meta.descriptionTemplate: See the {{brand}} coconut charcoal factory in {{city}}: a video walkthrough, in-person visits, and buyer-appointed pre-shipment inspection. Verify the factory before you commit.

heroSubtitle: Don't take our word for it — see the {{brand}} factory for yourself. Watch the walkthrough, schedule an in-person visit, or send your own inspector.

hero.ctaVisitAria: Schedule a factory visit on WhatsApp
hero.ctaContactAria: Send an inquiry about visiting the factory

tldr.heading: In short
tldr.body: You can verify the {{brand}} factory in {{city}} three ways: watch a short video walkthrough of the production floor, schedule an in-person visit to see production and container stuffing, or appoint your own independent surveyor for pre-shipment inspection. We welcome all three.

intro.p1: Verification is the whole point of this page. It is part of our

video.body: A short walkthrough of the production floor — carbonization ovens, the briquetting lines, the drying tunnel, the QC station, and packing.
video.placeholder: The video walkthrough is being finalized. In the meantime, the written walkthrough below covers what the tour shows, and you're welcome to request a live WhatsApp video call.

walkthrough.body: Whether you watch the video, visit in person, or join a live WhatsApp video call, here is what you'll see across the {{facilityAreaGrouped}} m² factory:
stages: Carbonization ovens turning coconut shell into char
Milling and sieving the char to a uniform powder
Mixing with the natural binder and pressing into shape
The weathering area where briquettes rest before packing
The QC bench running moisture and burn/ash tests
Packing and container stuffing for export

visit.body: We welcome serious buyers to visit. Come and see production, the QC bench, and a container being stuffed and sealed. We can also arrange a live WhatsApp video call if travel isn't practical right now. Tell us your timeline and we'll set it up.

inspection.body: You don't have to rely on our word, or even our video. You may appoint an independent pre-shipment surveyor at your cost — for example SGS, Intertek, or Bureau Veritas — to inspect the goods and the loading before the container sails. We coordinate access and the timing around your booking.

audit.body: Our factory has been audited by an independent inspection body. We can share the audit summary on request as part of your due diligence.

orientation.body: Here is the path a typical order follows, so you know what each step looks like before you start:
steps: Contact us with your target specs and destination
Free samples to verify the burn in your own lab
Quotation — price, MOQ, and lead time
Deposit confirms the order and schedules production
Inspection — ours, and yours if you appoint a surveyor

guarantee.body: Our specification guarantee and exchange/refund remedy are covered under Quality.

items.q: Can I visit or see the factory?
items.a: Yes. We welcome serious buyers to visit our {{city}} factory to see production, QC, and container stuffing. If travel isn't practical, we'll arrange a live WhatsApp video call.

items.q: Can I send my own inspector?
items.a: Yes. You may appoint an independent pre-shipment surveyor — for example SGS, Intertek, or Bureau Veritas — at your cost. We coordinate access and timing around your booking.

items.q: Do you offer a video tour or audit?
items.a: Yes. There is a video walkthrough of the production floor, and our factory has been independently audited — we can share the audit summary on request.
